_meta.description: Fill every [null, null] with (x, y). Capture UI states with: python -m src.cv_bridge.emulator_bridge capture. Mark coordinates offline with: python -m src.cv_bridge.emulator_bridge annotate
_meta.coordinate_system: Landscape display pixels after EmulatorBridge rotation (typically 1920x1080).
notes: Move slots 1-4 are canonical (alphabetical) slots, not fixed move names.
Bench/switch slots 1-6 are 1-based team roster positions from your pasted team.
Target offsets: ally_slot_b=-2, ally_slot_a=-1, default=0, opp_slot_a=1, opp_slot_b=2.

_action_space_reference.index_1_to_6: switch -> bench slot N (team roster position)
_action_space_reference.index_7_plus: move: decode via move_slot (1-4), target_offset (-2..2), mega, tera
_action_space_reference.teampreview_output: /team ABCD — four 1-based roster slots (2 leads + 2 backline)

teampreview._description: Team PreviewModel picks 4 of 6; map roster positions 1-6 on the team sheet.

battle._description: In-battle taps to execute decoded (ca0, ca1) pairs. Doubles: command slot A then slot B in order; no slot-select tap.

moves._description: Canonical move slots 1-4 for whichever active is currently being commanded (A, then B in doubles).

gimmicks._description: Tap before the move when decode reports mega=true or tera=true.

switch._description: Switch flow: Pokémon button -> teampreview.roster_slot_N -> popup_offset.switch_in (relative to row tap).

popup_offset._description: Offsets from the bench row tap (same coords as teampreview.roster_slot_N). Calibrate on roster row 3 screenshot.

targets._description: Field target picker after a move that needs a target. default needs no tap.

action_executor_sequence._description: Reference only — typical tap order per decoded slot action (not coordinates).

perception_regions._description: Optional CV regions (x, y, width, height) for future perception module. Use null until mapped.
